title: Son's prolonged fever and flu symptoms
first_prompt: My son Kenya has had a fever and flu-like symptoms for the past 6 days. It started with a high fever (104) and headache, chills. After four days the fever was up and down, but now he has a sore throat
summary: Irwin was seeking medical guidance regarding his son's six-day bout of flu-like symptoms, which included fever, cough, and localized pain, to determine the underlying cause and necessary level of care. As Irwin added symptoms like joint soreness and dizziness on standing, the assistant repeatedly escalated the urgency, advising that the situation moved beyond "wait and see" and required immediate medical attention. After ruling out tick-borne illness, the conversation concluded by narrowing the differential diagnosis to three possibilities: influenza or a similar virus with post-viral symptoms, secondary bacterial sinusitis, or strep.
